rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Low SLA indicates service reliability issue.

description.short: Calculate minimum sampling rate for biological signals (Nyquist theorem).
description.long: Calculate minimum sampling rate for biological signals (Nyquist theorem).

short_i18n.en: Calculate minimum sampling rate for biological signals (Nyquist theorem).
short_i18n.tr: Sinyalde örtüşmeyi (aliasing) önleyen minimum ADC örnekleme hızını Nyquist teoremi ile hesaplar.

short_i18n.es: Calculate minimum sampling rate for biological signals (Nyquist theorem).
short_i18n.ar: Calculate minimum sampling rate for biological signals (Nyquist theorem).
